title: As stars drop out, Trump floats canceling Freedom 250 concert for rally
shortDescription: "I don't want so-called 'Artists' that get paid far too much money, who aren't happy," he wrote online.

title: Trump, nearly obese, but in 'excellent health,' per physical results
shortDescription: The White House doctor recommended increased physical activity and weight loss.

title: Is Trump a convicted felon? He was convicted of this 2 years ago
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is the first president, current or former, to be convicted of a crime. These felonies have not yet been erased.

title: Jill Biden reveals what Trump told her after being sworn in
shortDescription: Nuggets from Jill Biden's memoir include an awkward car ride with Melania and a grudge with Kamala Harris.

title: Pentagon inviting soldiers to Trump's UFC fight, but only if they're fit
shortDescription: Around 1,200 active-duty service members will attend the Ultimate Fighting Championship match at the White House.

title: Paxton trails Talarico despite winning Texas Senate runoff, says poll
shortDescription: A new poll shows Democrat James Talarico leading Republican Ken Paxton 47% to 44% in the Texas Senate race — within the margin of error.

title: Paxton trails Talarico despite winning Texas Senate runoff, says poll
shortDescription: A new poll shows Democrat James Talarico leading Republican Ken Paxton 47% to 44% in the Texas Senate race — within the margin of error.

title: Judge blocks Trump rebrand of Kennedy Center
shortDescription: A federal judge ordered President Donald Trump's name to be removed from the Kennedy Center, ruling the rebranding to be illegal.

title: Postal Service seeks mail-in voter lists after Trump order
shortDescription: The Postal Service proposed to require states to provide names and barcodes for mail-in ballots as part of Trump’s contentious election security push.

title: Trump's name must be removed from Kennedy Center, judge orders
shortDescription: A federal judge ordered President Donald Trump's name be removed from the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts, ruling the name change was illegal.

title: Democrats hammer Pam Bondi testimony
shortDescription: Democrats accuse Pam Bondi and the Justice Department of blocking answers as scrutiny grows over Epstein related records.

title: See latest Trump approval rating polls after Texas GOP runoff win
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating has been under water for more than a year. But he retains control on the GOP, as seen in the Texas primary.

title: Trump concludes Iran meeting without announcing a decision on deal
shortDescription: President Trump ended a two-hour meeting with his national security team without announcing his "final determination" on a potential deal with Iran.

title: 'Still TBD' whether Trump will sign off on Iran deal, Vance says
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance said the Trump administration is "very close" to agreeing to a deal with Iran but is "not there yet."

title: Judge blocks $1.8B Trump 'anti-weaponization' fund
shortDescription: A judge temporarily blocked Trump's $1.8B fund to compensate people investigated by the Justice Department, which critics have called a slush fund.
